title: carex delicata subsp. selengensis
intro: Carex delicata subsp. selengensis, also known as a type of sedge, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to relieve pain and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Carex delicata subsp. selengensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
